spawn_point.notes: The game begins here. Initial spawn is PLAYERS_HOUSE_2F at tile (3,3).

tile_layout.notes: 8 columns x 6 rows. Warp at (7,0) is stairs down to 1F. BG events: PC at (2,1), Radio at (3,1), Bookshelf at (5,1) and (6,0) for poster. Object events: Console at (4,2), Doll1 at (4,4), Doll2 at (5,4), BigDoll at (0,1). Player spawn at (3,3). Tileset is TILESET_PLAYERS_ROOM which includes bedroom furniture tiles.

bg_events.description: PC. Accesses Pokecom PC system (Bill's PC for item and Pokemon storage). On game start allows player to warp to Elm's Lab intro.
Radio. Before getting a starter, plays Prof. Oak's Pokemon Talk intro (MUSIC_POKEMON_TALK jingle with DJ Mary). After getting starter, plays standard Radio1Script.
Bookshelf. Calls DifficultBookshelfScript (standard difficult reading text).
Poster on wall (decoration). Only interactable if EVENT_PLAYERS_ROOM_POSTER is set (poster decoration purchased by Mom).

object_events.description: Game console / N64 decoration. Interactable as decoration (DECODESC_CONSOLE). Purchased by Mom as bedroom decoration.
Small doll decoration (left). Interactable as DECODESC_LEFT_DOLL.
Small doll decoration (right). Interactable as DECODESC_RIGHT_DOLL.
Large doll decoration (e.g. Clefairy doll). Interactable as DECODESC_BIG_DOLL.

map_callbacks.notes: Runs ToggleDecorationsVisibility; initializes events on very first visit (jumpstd InitializeEventsScript)
Runs ToggleMaptileDecorations — updates tile graphics based on which decorations Mom has bought

decorations.description: The 2F bedroom supports the full Gen II decoration system. Mom buys decorations using saved prize money. Decoration slots are: console (N64), left_doll, right_doll, big_doll, poster, and potentially bed/carpet variants. Each decoration is toggled via event flags and rendered by MAPCALLBACK_TILES.

notes: The player's bedroom — the game's true starting location. Player spawns here at (3,3) at the very beginning of the game. The radio triggers an intro Pokemon Talk broadcast before a starter is obtained (EVENT_LISTENED_TO_INITIAL_RADIO tracks this). The PC can warp player to Elm's Lab before events are underway. The room uses the decoration system: MAPCALLBACK_TILES rerenders floor and wall tiles as Mom purchases decorations. Tileset TILESET_PLAYERS_ROOM has unique bedroom-specific tiles not shared with 1F. Stairs at top-right corner (7,0) lead back to 1F.
